caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, a red bow tie, glasses, and a tall, grey, pointed wig speaks into a professional microphone. He wears over-ear headphones and is positioned in a room featuring walls decorated with framed photographs and clothing racks. A microphone is positioned in the foreground to the left, and a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is visible on the left and right sides of the scene. Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, speaking with his mouth slightly open and shifting his facial expression slightly. He maintains a consistent posture, though subtle movements in his head and jaw occur as he talks. The background, including the framed pictures and the surrounding studio equipment, remains stationary throughout the frames.
